meta.content: Aayush Nursing Bureau - Professional Home Nursing Care Services in Delhi NCR. ICU trained nurses, 24/7 patient care, elderly care, post surgery care, Japa maid, physiotherapy at home. Affordable healthcare packages.

meta.content: Aayush Nursing Bureau, Home Nursing, Patient Care, ICU Nurses, Delhi NCR, Elderly Care, Paralysis Care, Post Surgery Care, Japa Maid, Physiotherapy, Home Healthcare, Delhi, Noida, Ghaziabad

head.script: { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "MedicalBusiness", "name": "Aayush Nursing Bureau", "description": "Professional Home Nursing Care Services in Delhi NCR", "url": "https://aayushnursingbureau.blogspot.com", "telephone": "+919212066102", "email": "shyamsundergupta487@gmail.com", "address": { "@type": "PostalAddress", "streetAddress": "Behind Rotary Noida Blood Bank, near Radha Krishna Mandir, Nithari Village, Sector 31", "addressLocality": "Noida", "addressRegion": "Uttar Pradesh", "postalCode": "201303", "addressCountry": "IN" }, "areaServed": ["Delhi", "Noida", "Greater Noida", "Ghaziabad"], "priceRange": "₹₹", "openingHours": "Mo-Su 00:00-24:00", "founder": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Shyam Sunder Gupta" }, "sameAs": [ "https://www.facebook.com/aayushnursing/", "https://www.instagram.com/aayushnursingbureau/", "https://youtube.com/@aayushnursingbureau", "https://www.aayushnursingbureau.com/", "https://www.aayushnursingbureau.in/" ] }

div.h1: Professional Home Nursing Care at Your Doorstep
div.p: Expert ICU trained nurses and dedicated patient care services in Delhi NCR. We provide compassionate healthcare solutions for your loved ones in the comfort of your home.

img.alt: Aayush Nursing Bureau – Professional Home Healthcare

div.p: Aayush Nursing Bureau is a trusted name in home healthcare services in Delhi NCR. Founded by Shyam Sunder Gupta, we are committed to providing professional and compassionate nursing care to patients in the comfort of their homes.
Our team of ICU trained nurses and healthcare professionals ensures the highest quality of medical care, making recovery faster and more comfortable for patients and their families.
Comprehensive home healthcare solutions tailored to meet your unique needs
Highly skilled ICU trained nurses with extensive experience in critical care and life-support systems.
Flexible patient care packages – 12 hours or 24 hours shift options for continuous medical support.
Specialized care for elderly patients including medication management, daily assistance, and companionship.
Expert care for paralysis and stroke patients with physiotherapy support and rehabilitation services.
Professional post-operative care including wound management, medication, and recovery support.
Experienced japa maids for mother and baby care, providing support during postpartum recovery.
Professional physiotherapists for home visits to help with rehabilitation and mobility improvement.
We are committed to providing the best healthcare experience for you and your family
Round-the-clock customer support and emergency assistance whenever you need it.
All our nurses are verified, trained, and experienced in handling critical healthcare situations.
Flexible and budget-friendly healthcare packages tailored to your specific requirements.
Quick response and immediate availability for emergency healthcare situations.
Real testimonials from families who trusted us with their loved ones' care
"Aayush Nursing Bureau provided excellent care for my mother after her surgery. The nurses were professional, compassionate, and treated her like family."
"Very satisfied with the 24-hour patient care for my father. The team is extremely dedicated and provides excellent medical support. Highly recommended!"
"The japa maid service was a blessing for us. The care and support provided during postpartum was exceptional. Thank you Aayush Nursing Bureau!"
"My father suffered a stroke and we needed immediate care. Aayush Nursing Bureau arranged an experienced nurse within hours. Outstanding service!"
Find answers to common questions about our home healthcare services

button.span: How do I book a nurse for home care?

div.div: You can book a nurse by calling us at +91 9212066102 or +91 9211997104, or fill out the booking form on this page. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to discuss your requirements.
We provide 24/7 services throughout the year. Our nurses are available for both 12-hour and 24-hour shifts depending on your needs.

button.span: Do you provide services in all areas of Delhi NCR?

div.div: Yes, we provide our services across Delhi, Noida, Greater Noida, and Ghaziabad. We also serve nearby areas based on request.

button.span: Are your nurses verified and trained?

div.div: Yes, all our nurses are thoroughly verified, background checked, and have undergone proper training. Many of our nurses are ICU trained with years of hospital experience.

button.span: What is the cost of your services?

div.div: Our pricing depends on the type of care required, duration, and specific services. We offer affordable and flexible packages. Please contact us for a detailed quote based on your requirements.

button.span: Can I get emergency nursing care on the same day?

div.div: Yes, we have an emergency response system. In most cases, we can arrange nursing care within a few hours of your call, subject to staff availability.

div.p: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you within 24 hours
Get in touch with us for all your home healthcare needs

p.a: Behind Rotary Noida Blood Bank, near Radha Krishna Mandir, Nithari Village, Sector 31, Noida, UP 201303

div.p: 24 Hours, 7 Days a Week
Professional home nursing care services in Delhi NCR. We provide compassionate and expert healthcare solutions for your loved ones.

li.span: Behind Rotary Noida Blood Bank, near Radha Krishna Mandir, Nithari Village, Sector 31, Noida, UP 201303
